records.ety: [L. densus; akin to Gr. dasy` thick with hair or leaves: cf. F. dense.]

defs: Having the constituent parts massed or crowded together; close; compact; thick; containing much matter in a small space; heavy; opaque; as, a dense crowd; a dense forest; a dense fog.
quotes: All sorts of bodies, firm and fluid, dense and rare.
To replace the cloudy barrier dense.

defs: Stupid; gross; crass; as, dense ignorance.
